_comment: This file tells the unified-build workflow which org contains the source repos. When you fork this manifest repo, this file travels with it automatically — no manual setup needed.

fork_mode.description: When forked, the unified-build workflow will build repos from source_org using the fork's workflow file. Set override_org to build from a different org.

tiers.1: Core OS layer — EoS RTOS, eBoot, eAI, eDB, eIPC, eosllm
tiers.2: Platform tools — EoSim, EoStudio, eVera, eBrowser, eCAD
tiers.3: Application layer — eOffice, eApps, HEALTH-BAND-Neuro, HealthKey-Ulta, eNI
